description_long: This is a full-sized baseball glove featuring a two-tone color scheme of dark gray and tan leather. The glove has a prominent H-web pattern at the pocket, with thick tan leather strips forming the webbing and reinforced lacing throughout the fingers and perimeter. The finger stalls are well-padded and separated, each outlined with tan lacing for durability and structure. Decorative stitching and embossed text are visible on the thumb and pinky areas, with a circular patch and a triangular pattern adding visual interest. The interior of the glove is slightly open, revealing a soft, padded lining designed for comfort and grip. The wrist area is open with a simple leather strap, lacking any visible closure mechanism.
description: A dark gray and tan leather baseball glove with an H-web pattern, reinforced lacing, and visible decorative stitching and patches.
description_view_0: This view highlights the H-web pattern and thick tan lacing at the pocket, showing the glove's open catching area.
description_view_1: The back of the glove is visible, displaying the long, parallel finger stalls and extensive tan lacing along the fingers and perimeter.
description_view_2: This angle shows the glove's thumb and pinky sides, with visible embossed text and a triangular decorative patch.
description_view_3: The side view reveals the circular patch, the triangular pattern, and the open wrist strap, as well as the glove's overall curvature.
attribute_finger_stalls: Five finger stalls, each individually separated and padded, with reinforced tan lacing outlining each stall.
attribute_lacing_style: Cross-laced and single-laced patterns, with prominent lacing at the webbing, finger stalls, and perimeter of the glove.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo patch is visible on the side near the wrist, and an orange triangular patch with 'Base Ball' text is present on the thumb area. No specific brand name is clearly visible.
attribute_wrist_strap_design: Open leather wrist strap with no visible closure mechanism or adjustment features; simple and unadorned.
